items.name: security-audit
items.title: Security Audit
items.description: Run a full-codebase security audit covering OWASP Top 10:2025 vulnerability classes, authentication and authorization logic, secret handling, input validation, dependency CVEs, and supply-chain risk. Broader than the secret-scan skill, which scans a single diff. Produces a structured findings report ranked by severity. Pass a path to limit the audit to a specific module or directory.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
